events.name: alien_signal
events.description: Strange crystalline structures found in deep drill core.

events.name: solar_flare
events.description: Severe radiation event — all colonists confined to shielded core.

events.name: equipment_failure
events.description: Greenhouse dome seal breach — crops exposed to vacuum.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

meta_awareness.insight: Fen Marsh whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'
Dax Iron asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'
Reed Shore wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.

memories.event: Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Subsurface water table detected by ground-penetrating radar.
Unknown pathogen spreads through the water system.
Repeating pattern in cosmic ray data — statistical fluke or message?

Cryovolcanic eruption 200km north — ground tremors felt.
A massive dust storm engulfs the colony for weeks.
A bitter dispute over food rationing escalates to shouting.
